sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. still very much a dense treat because it cannot escape being a treat food just because it is darker. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Dark Chocolate 85% does have some solid upside, especially meaningfully better than typical candy and clear real-world role. but still very much a dense treat and easy to overrate or misuse keep it from climbing higher. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
